title: 政府と環境保護①
question: Do you think the government should do more to protect natural areas of beauty in your country?
question_jp: 政府は自国の自然の景勝地をもっと保護すべきだと思いますか？
model_answer: I get the reason people want to protect these places, but I'm not sure that's the best solution.
If the government gets involved, it could mean a lot more red tape.
I think it could be a big waste of time, as the rules would be almost impossible to enforce.
At the end of the day, each person should pitch in to clean the environment instead.

items.meaning: お役所仕事・官僚主義の手続き

items.front: at the end of the day
items.collocation: at the end of the day, …

drills.jp: 守りたい気持ちは理解できるが、それが最善策とは思わない。
drills.model_en: I get why people want to protect them, but I'm not sure it's the best solution.

drills.jp: 政府が関与すると、お役所仕事が増えるかもしれない。
drills.model_en: If the government gets involved, it could mean more red tape.

drills.jp: 結局のところ、代わりに一人ひとりが協力して環境を清掃すべきだ。
drills.model_en: At the end of the day, each person should pitch in to clean the environment.
